source.caption: Épure E 61 (c) : rabattement du triangle ABC sur le plan horizontal, la charnière — verticale sur l'épure — étant une droite de bout du plan passant par A.

notes: Right half of the fig02 sheet. Ground line straightened to y=136 (drawn (363,130)-(712,142), scan skew).

« Charnière verticale » describes the DRAWING: the hinge appears as the vertical line x=522. Geometrically it is a droite de bout of the plane — horizontal (z=0, hence hingeKind horizontal and no aV/bV; its V trace is the point where the drawn line meets the LT), perpendicular to πV, through A. The fold lands on πH.
The plate preserves the invariants: distance-to-axis B 129→122px, C 80→78px; depths unchanged (B 319→321, C 246→246). B and C land on opposite sides of the hinge because B is above πH and C below.
C^V sits under the LT (C below πH), mirroring fig01a.
